news-korea-econ.title: REP RO KHANNA: Trump needs to stop hurting American workers and stand up to China
news-korea-econ.description: President Donald Trump prepares to visit Beijing in May amid rising gas prices, a tumbling stock market and a record-high U.S. trade deficit with China.

news-global-econ.title: Economist editor says European leaders now fear a true NATO 'divorce' after Trump pullout threat
news-global-econ.description: Trump is reportedly considering pulling the U.S. out of NATO, and European leaders are coming to terms with what may be a true divorce, says an editor.

news-global-econ.title: Obama Center takes heat as critics cry foul over ID rules for free entry — while Dems blast voter ID laws
news-global-econ.description: The Obama Presidential Center faces criticism over requiring ID for free admission, taxpayer costs and executive pay ahead of its upcoming opening.

news-global-econ.title: ABC News had a 75-person division dedicated to 'get' Trump, Billy Bush claims
news-global-econ.description: On the "Hang Out with Sean Hannity" podcast," former TV host Billy Bush alleged ABC News had a 75-person division dedicated to "get" Donald Trump during the 2016 election.

news-global-econ.title: Mamdani unveils new 'racial equity plan' for more 'equitable future' that prompts quick DOJ pushback
news-global-econ.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani releases New York City's first citywide racial equity plan, prompting conservative pushback and a DOJ review of the new initiative.

news-global-soc.title: CBS to replace Colbert’s ‘Late Show’ with Byron Allen’s ‘Comics Unleashed’
news-global-soc.description: CBS is replacing Stephen Colbert's canceled "Late Show" with Byron Allen's "Comics Unleashed" in a historic late night shakeup beginning May 2026.

news-global-soc.description:
Direct lithium extraction in the U.S. in key states such as Arkansas could help break U.S. reliance on China, which dominates the supply chain on many critical minerals, Standard Lithium CEO David Park said during an appearance on Breitbart News Daily.

news-global-soc.title: Democratic Republic of the Congo Agrees to Take Third-Country Deportees from U.S.
news-global-soc.description:
The Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) said on Sunday it has agreed to accept migrants from third countries who have been deported from the United States. The first wave of deportees is expected to arrive later this month.
